'''鈭歵-d-d''' ('''tadada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vail|vail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vail|vail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| tadada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tadadithi|tadadithi]] || [[word:tadadiji|tadadiji]] || [[word:tadadishi|tadadishi]] || [[word:tadadi|tadadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadaduthuth|tadaduthuth]] || [[word:tadadujuj|tadadujuj]] || [[word:tadadushush|tadadushush]] || [[word:tadad|tadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadaduthu|tadaduthu]] || [[word:tadaduju|tadaduju]] || [[word:tadadushu|tadadushu]] || [[word:tadadu|tadadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadadufuth|tadadufuth]] || [[word:tadadufuj|tadadufuj]] || [[word:tadadufush|tadadufush]] || [[word:tadaduf|tadaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tadadethe|tadadethe]] || [[word:tadadeje|tadadeje]] || [[word:tadadeshe|tadadeshe]] || [[word:tadade|tadade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadothoth|tadadothoth]] || [[word:tadadojoj|tadadojoj]] || [[word:tadadoshosh|tadadoshosh]] || [[word:tadad|tadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadadotho|tadadotho]] || [[word:tadadojo|tadadojo]] || [[word:tadadosho|tadadosho]] || [[word:tadado|tadado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadadofoth|tadadofoth]] || [[word:tadadofoj|tadadofoj]] || [[word:tadadofosh|tadadofosh]] || [[word:tadadof|tadadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tadad忙th忙|tadad忙th忙]] || [[word:tadad忙j忙|tadad忙j忙]] || [[word:tadad忙sh忙|tadad忙sh忙]] || [[word:tadad忙|tadad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadadathath|tadadathath]] || [[word:tadadajaj|tadadajaj]] || [[word:tadadashash|tadadashash]] || [[word:tadad|tadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadadatha|tadadatha]] || [[word:tadadaja|tadadaja]] || [[word:tadadasha|tadadasha]] || [[word:tadada|tadada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadadafath|tadadafath]] || [[word:tadadafaj|tadadafaj]] || [[word:tadadafash|tadadafash]] || [[word:tadadaf|tadadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tadadasha|tadadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotadadasha|gotadadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitadadasha|gokitadadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tadadn眉sha|tadadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotadadnkn眉sha|gotadadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitadadn眉sha|gokitadadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tadadsh毛sha|tadadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotadadnksh毛sha|gotadadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitadadsh毛sha|gokitadadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tadadrosha|tadadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotadadnkrosha|gotadadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitadadrosha|gokitadadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadmusha|tadadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadadnkmusha|gotadadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadmusha|gokitadadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tadadsherasha|tadadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotadadnksherasha|gotadadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitadadsherasha|gokitadadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tadadngasha|tadadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotadadnkngasha|gotadadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitadadngasha|gokitadadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tadadyasha|tadadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotadadnkyasha|gotadadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitadadyasha|gokitadadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tadadyamasha|tadadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotadadnkyamasha|gotadadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitadadyamasha|gokitadadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tadadn眉sh毛sha|tadadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotadadnkn眉sh毛sha|gotadadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitadadn眉sh毛sha|gokitadadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tadadn眉rosha|tadadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotadadnkn眉rosha|gotadadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitadadn眉rosha|gokitadadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadn眉musha|tadadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadadnkn眉musha|gotadadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadn眉musha|gokitadadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tadadsh毛n眉sha|tadadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotadadnksh毛n眉sha|gotadadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitadadsh毛n眉sha|gokitadadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tadadsh毛rosha|tadadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotadadnksh毛rosha|gotadadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitadadsh毛rosha|gokitadadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadsh毛musha|tadadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadadnksh毛musha|gotadadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadsh毛musha|gokitadadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tadadron眉sha|tadadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotadadnkron眉sha|gotadadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitadadron眉sha|gokitadadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tadadrosh毛sha|tadadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotadadnkrosh毛sha|gotadadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitadadrosh毛sha|gokitadadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadromusha|tadadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadadnkromusha|gotadadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadromusha|gokitadadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tadadmun眉sha|tadadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotadadnkmun眉sha|gotadadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitadadmun眉sha|gokitadadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tadadmush毛sha|tadadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotadadnkmush毛sha|gotadadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitadadmush毛sha|gokitadadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tadadmurosha|tadadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotadadnkmurosha|gotadadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitadadmurosha|gokitadadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tadad|tadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙d忙d|t忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotadad|hotadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙d忙d|hot忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotadad|hohotadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙d忙d|hohot忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tadad|n眉tadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙d忙d|n眉t忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tadad|n眉n眉tadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙d忙d|n眉n眉t忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tadad|n茂tadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙d忙d|n茂t忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tadad|n茂n茂tadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙d忙d|n茂n茂t忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutadad|lutadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙d忙d|lut忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutadad|lulutadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙d忙d|lulut忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litadad|litadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙d忙d|lit忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitadad|lilitadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙d忙d|lilit忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotadad|kotadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙d忙d|kot忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotadad|kokotadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙d忙d|kokot忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketadad|ketadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙d忙d|ket忙d忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketadad|keketadad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙d忙d|keket忙d忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
